_comment: Central affiliate link registry for losttou.ch. Each entry has a plain (non-affiliate) destination URL. See README.md 'Swapping in your real Amazon Associates tag' for exact instructions. Leave amazonTagGlobal empty until your Associates application is approved -- js/affiliate.js will only append tracking parameters once a tag is present. URLs are Amazon searches for a specific, currently-sold product (rather than a bare category search or a hardcoded product-page/ASIN link) so they stay precise but don't go dead when a specific listing is discontinued.

keepsake-box.label: wooden keepsake box with a photo-frame lid

letter-writing-set.label: Crane & Co. cotton paper stationery set

external-hard-drive.label: WD My Passport external hard drive

memory-jar.label: Top Shelf Love Notes memory jar kit

care-package-box.label: reusable magnetic-lid gift box for a care package
